description: Western New England Bancorp, Inc. operates as the holding company for Westfield Bank that provides various commercial and retail banking products and services to individuals and companies. It offers various deposit products, including commercial, small business, nonprofit and municipal checking, money market, sweep accounts, time deposits, interest-bearing and noninterest-bearing checking, and individual retirement accounts, as well as certificates of deposit. The company also originates and funds commercial and residential real estate loans, including first mortgages, home equity loans, and h
